title: WYSWYG 6PCS Classic Base plates,10''x10'' Building Board Baseplate, Compatible with All Major Brands,White, (S003)
features: ✅ Keep Your Child Happily Busy: This set of 6 building bricks boards base plates will help your kid express his creativity, building cities, farmhouses and large building block scenes in the comfort of his room.

✅ Build Multiple House or Street Floors: These flat building blocks baseplates are compatible with most building blocks series, including CLASSIC regular size series building blocks - but not with large building blocks!

✅ Spend Quality Time with Your Kids: Join forces with your kid, for 1000+1 classic brick constructions! The ABS brick base plate will hold your building bricks creations firmly put and the included tool will make removal easier.

✅ Take This Fun building bricks boards set Everywhere: Toss these stackable building mat in your luggage and carry them everywhere. The heavy-duty ABS baseplates board won't bend, break or lose their shape during your travels.

✅ Make Your Boys or Girls Smile: This set of 6 single-sided baseplate compatible with lego table with storage in vibrant Blue, Green and Gray makes the best gift idea for little engineers aged 6 years and above.
description: From the brand Previous page WYSWYG has been selling well in the US and Europe since its inception in 2018, with millions of products sold and loved by children and parents alike.
